## Meeting Purpose

[Final interview for Managing Editor position at GoText with candidate Ismail Ajagbe.](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ismail is highly motivated by GoText's innovative approach to AI-powered content creation and sees it as a perfect fit for his skills and interests.](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [He emphasizes his ability to deeply understand client needs, become a subject matter expert quickly, and deliver measurable results through strategic content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Marcel highlighted the evolving nature of the role, emphasizing strategy, scalability, and potential for growth beyond just content production.](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [GoText values extreme ownership, accountability, and continuous improvement in its team culture.](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Motivation and Background

  - [Ismail is drawn to GoText's innovative use of AI in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Views the role as aligning with his skills in technical content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Emphasizes his ability to understand audience needs and drive measurable results](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Highlights experience with clients like ScrapingBee, achieving 1.5M organic page views](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### Candidate's Approach and Strengths

  - [Self-described "superpower": Understanding audience needs and crafting impactful content](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Analytical approach: Uses data, user intent, and competitive landscape to inform content](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Becomes a subject matter expert for clients, diving deep into research and industry details](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Collaborative team player with a strategic mindset](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

### Role Expectations and Company Culture

  - [Role involves strategy, execution, and scaling processes for multiple technical clients](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Evolving position: Managing editor → consultant → manager → potential product manager](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [GoText culture values:](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
      - [Extreme ownership and accountability](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
      - [Continuous improvement and "bar-raising"](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
      - [High standards, especially for client work](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
      - [Global talent acquisition with competitive compensation](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)

### Client Work and Technical Expertise

  - [Potential clients include Prompt Food (LLM security), Galileo (LLM evaluation), Strapi (headless CMS)](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Ismail's technical background seen as valuable for these types of clients](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Emphasis on ability to quickly ramp up knowledge in new technical domains](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)

### Growth Areas and Challenges

  - [Expanding expertise in AI-powered content creation tools](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Strengthening project management and client communication skills](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Balancing strategic work with necessary administrative tasks](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to complete final round interviews this week](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
  - [Conduct reference checks for top candidates](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
  - [Make final hiring decisions for 3-5 positions out of \~12 finalists (from 2,000+ applicants)](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
  - [Communicate decision to candidates as quickly as possible](https://fathom.video/share/rRYz-Jp6BkUVTuGHTJ5a5gp_LnzpwUga?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
